title: cyathea parkeri
intro: Cyathea parkeri, also known as the Parker's tree fern or New Zealand tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. The plant's rhizome and fronds are used in traditional medicine, containing medicinal properties such as antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Cyathea parkeri include treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, as well as wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
